bugs.title: Git tag NOT applied; chiseledBuild/chiseledTest/chiseledRunGametest not verified by orchestrator session
bugs.evidence: Verification doc status: HOLD. The orchestrator session cannot run ./gradlew chiseledBuild and therefore cannot honestly confirm GREEN status on the 5 MC versions. Per Anthropic guidance, claiming verification without evidence is forbidden.
bugs.expected: Per Task 9 / wave-2 acceptance: ./gradlew chiseledBuild green on all 5 versions; ./gradlew chiseledTest green on all 5 versions; ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest green on all 5 versions; git tag phase-4-smithing-ladder applied and pushed.
bugs.suggested_fix: User runs ./gradlew chiseledBuild locally. If GREEN, runs chiseledTest and chiseledRunGametest. If all GREEN, applies the tag with `git tag phase-4-smithing-ladder && git push origin phase-4-smithing-ladder` and updates the verification doc status from HOLD to DONE.
